notes: Manual War Room pricing file. Set rates to numbers per 1,000,000 tokens before relying on cost totals. Claude rows are a fallback; Claude --output-format json reports total_cost_usd directly and War Room prefers that when present.

claude-opus-4-7.notes: Fallback only; adapter-reported total_cost_usd is preferred.

claude-sonnet-4-6.notes: Fallback only; adapter-reported total_cost_usd is preferred.

claude-haiku-4-5.notes: Fallback only; adapter-reported total_cost_usd is preferred.
